blocks.text: Cricket update: Sciver-Brunt stars as England beat SA to reach World Cup final. England recover from an early loss of wickets to fight back and comfortably beat South Africa by 40 runs at The Oval, to book their place in the ICC Women's T20 World Cup final, where they'll face the six-time champions Australia at Lord's.
